name: ZeroStack Corp.
summary: ZeroStack Corp. (formerly Flora Growth Corp.) was incorporated as Flora Growth Corp. on March 13, 2019, under the laws of the Province of Ontario. On January 29, 2026, the Company changed its corporate name from "Flora Growth Corp." to "ZeroStack Corp." and changed its Nasdaq ticker from "FLGC" to "ZSTK".
